name: sabai-mermaid
description: Interactive Mermaid diagram editor as an MCP App for Claude

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently 'npm run watch' 'npm run serve'
